content: I remember a period of time when I was hitchhiking along the California coast, specifically in Northern California, north of the San Francisco Bay, and during that time I slept under the stars every night for a succession of nights, while the Hale-Bopp comet hung in the night sky fantastically for several nights in a row. Maybe you can determine how long it was visible during that period better than I can remember, but that is a strong memory in my experience of those years.
